description: Shiki is a Lich and presently in servitude to Makoto Misumi. His origins and original name are unknown. name: Tobi Otogiri
description: Tobi comes off as rude and somewhat abrasive at first appearance in the manga. Rei notes that he looks displeased. Tobi offers advice and help to Rei which shows that he is not as unpleasant as previously shown. He seems to be slightly annoyed by Noppo and other small Zingai. The animator of How to Eat Life described him as listless with an 'unpleasant' look on his face.

She is noticeably less serious at "home", slacking off and acting like a dependent, the opposite of a leader, with baby chicks appearing atop her head. description: A young demon girl who found Western Restaurant Nekoya while jobless and down on her luck, and ended up being hired there. name: Futaba Isurugi
description: Futaba Isurugi is a character in the Shōjo☆Kageki Revue Starlight franchise. She is a second-year student from the Actor Training Department at Seisho Music Academy's 99th Graduating Class. A highly unorthodox Stage Girl who came to Seisho Music Academy along with her childhood friend Kaoruko. Kind-hearted despite her rough words, she takes care of Kaoruko while always griping. Tiny but athletic, she shows deadly aptitude for staged swordfights.
